query: I was charged twice this month and I want a refund.
final_response: It seems you've been charged twice. We can investigate this duplicate billing and process a refund for you.

approved_fragments.fragment: It seems you've been charged twice. We can investigate this duplicate billing and process a refund for you.

rejected_fragments.fragment: I understand you've been charged twice and are requesting a refund. As an AI, I am unable to directly process refunds or confirm eligibility. Refund eligibility is determined by your specific plan type, purchase date, and adherence to our policy guidelines. I will escalate this immediately to a human support agent who can review your account details and assist you further.

Duplicate charges can occur due to a system error. To investigate and process a refund, please contact support with your transaction ID. The refund for the duplicate charge will be processed within 5-7 business days.
I'm so sorry to hear you've been charged twice this month; I understand how frustrating that must be. I'll definitely help you look into this and get your refund sorted out.
